mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM `review` r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT r.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM `review` r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `review` WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `review` (order_id, order_item_id, user_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, rating, content, images, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{orderItemId}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{images}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE `review` SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
